transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: Okay, John, when you get around there (to the CDR seat), could you give me a film mag?
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Which one do you want me to use, Tony?
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: It's not very big, but it's just a nice rock.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Yeah, it was made about...It looks like it's about 3 days old (pause) though it must be on the order of 4 billion.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: Which one do you want, Charlie?
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: You already shot up a roll of black and white?
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: Dark slide is in the camera box (under the seat).
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: (Examining the magazine) Hope it runs; I got dust on it.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: (Stops to listen) Yeah, magazine India (which is also known as AS16-108).
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: And starting with frame count number about 3.
I guess I fired off a couple.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Okay, we're ready to press here.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: Okay, and just to make sure you didn't get any dust on that LCRU while you're working around there, we would like you to brush it off again.
We're really heating up on that.
transcript.speaker: England

tokens: (Looking at the LCRU) It is clean.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Want to shut it down for a while?
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: And, Charlie, on your LRV readouts, we won't be needing Volts, so why don't we just leave that switch in Amps?
transcript.speaker: England

tokens: (Pause as he reaches across to change the switch) Got it in Amps.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Going downhill (from Station 4), it doesn't get near as much dust as it did coming up, for some reason.
(Pause) Maybe that's because (chuckles) it was 4 kilometers one way (from the LM to Station 4) and half of one the other (from Station 4 to 5).
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: (Grabbing the inboard handhold) I hope I can get back in this beauty here now.
transcript.speaker: Duke

tokens: Don't do anything with the...(Stops to listen)
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: Station 5 there is 125 gamma down; the ALSEP site was 230 gamma - correction: (the Station 5 field is) up.
The ALSEP site was 230 gamma down; and Spook was 180 down.
transcript.speaker: England

tokens: No, I'm going to 1 right now.
transcript.speaker: Young

tokens: We thought maybe you were getting on...
transcript.speaker: England

tokens: That was a very interesting magnetometer reading.
transcript.speaker: England

tokens: I didn't think I'd ever...(Stops to listen) Well, give you a good alignment and read the numbers right, but (laughing) other than that I...
transcript.speaker: Young
